Notice Of Motion And Motion For Sanctions Pursuant To Ccp Section 128.7
Off Calendar Apr-20-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Barri Kaplan Bonapart (415-332-3313) for Plaintiff/Moving party HERBERT BEASLEY.
James Cook (no card provided) for Defendant/opposing party Sean Yore.

The Court announces the tentative ruling. Hearing is held. Argued re: sanctions, untimely opposition, reasons for imposition of sanctions, and demurrer.The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PLAINTIFF HERBERT BEASLEY'S Motion For Sanctions Pursuant To CCP Section 128.7 is Granted per CCP 128.7(b)(2). Sanctions granted against Defendant's counsel of record and his law firm as indicated on counsel's bar listing. Defendant's untimely opposition considered. Sanctions granted in the amount of $8,516.25 to be paid within 15 days of notice of entry of order. Order signed in open court. Judge: Suzanne R. Bolanos, Clerk: A. Pascual, Not Reported (D501)

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Mar-14-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Jeremy Paul, (415-332-3313), for Plaintiff/Opposing party Herber Beasley.
No other appearances.

Not argued. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT SEAN YORE'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is OVERRULLED in its entirety. Plaintiff alleges sufficient facts to support each cause of action. Order signed in Open Court. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (501)

MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Mar-14-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Jeremy Paul, (415-332-3313), for Plaintiff/Opposing party Herber Beasley.
No other appearances.

Not argued. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT SEAN YORE'S MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT is DENIED. Defendant failed to demonstrate how allegations in the complaint were either irrelevant, false, or improper within the meaning of CCP 436.
Order signed in Open Court. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (501)
